skills.name: dtf
skills.title: Reserve DTF skill
skills.description: Inspect, query, and transact with Reserve Protocol Decentralized Token Folios (DTFs). Covers Index DTFs and Yield DTFs across Ethereum, Base, and BSC: discovery, baskets, prices, quotes, fees, revenue, RSR burns, governance, proposals, roles, delegates, staking, rebalancing, holders, and history.
